search_query: earliest evidence of life in Greenland
combined_text: Oldest fossils on Earth discovered in 3.7bn-year-old Greenland rocks Fossils Oldest fossils on Earth discovered in 3.7bn-year-old Greenland rocks Fossils are 220 million years older than any previously found, dating life on Earth to an earlier point than thought and raising questions about life on Mars Nicola Davis@Nicola KSDavis Wed 31 Aug 2016 13.00 EDT15.45 ESTThi
